title: No Fun Alone
description: A semi-simple modpack for a personal server.
body:
![No Fun Alone](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/788633989229182977/1150510694236700852/No-Fun-Alone_1.png)

A semi-simple modpack designed for a personal server.
*Of course, feel free to use it on your own server!*

**No Fun Alone** is a modpack designed so a wide variety of players always have something fun to do. Featuring mods like **Origins**, **Ad Astra**, the **Let's Do** series, and more, there's about a million goals to accomplish. Quality of life mods such as **Autofish** and **Mousewheelie** also make it super simple to do some of the more boring tasks in the game. Plus, with **Rechiseled** and **Chipped**, vanilla blocks can still star in your builds. There are a few worldgen mods in there, too! Plus **EMI**, for ease of access to recipes and items. 


---
